msgs.text:
Turn 66 вҖ” final manuscript appendix, frozen as Certificates 0вҖ“F I found the required attached history file and used only the files attached to this turn. The target remains the over-G isomorphism problem for the two quotients О“S,О“H defined from F=PвӢҠG, with P the free G-operator pro-2 group on x0,x1, and with the desired condition ПҖHвҲҳОҰ=ПҖS.The appendix should now be written as a certificate theorem, not as another obstruction sweep.

Certificate Theorem

There exists a continuous automorphism ОҰ:Fвҹ¶F over G such thatОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH.

Consequently ОҰ(вҹЁвҹЁrSвҹ©вҹ©F)=вҹЁвҹЁrHвҹ©вҹ©F,and thereforeО“Sвү…GО“H.

The source orientation is fixed once and for all asПҒS:=rSвҲ’1.

This is harmless because rS and rSвҲ’1 generate the same closed normal subgroup. The attached sweep records this stronger F-level target as the final state: construct ОҰ:FвҶ’F over G with ОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH, then descend to the quotient.

Certificate 0 вҖ” orientationUseПҒS=rSвҲ’1.Every finite and profinite filtered Nielsen substitution is required to sendПҒSвҶҰrH.

This eliminates the sign ambiguity and matches the H1 -row convention used in the sweep.

Certificate A вҖ” right-row H1

Nielsen matrixLetОӣ=Z2 [[G]].

With right Оӣ-basis X0,X1 for Pab, the linearized relation rows arewS=(Пғ+3E,вҲ’2),wH=(Eg0+3EвҲ’2,ПғвҲ’E).

The sweep constructs a global

UвҲҲGL2(Оӣ)such thatwSU=wH.The appendix must print the basis-action convention before displaying U. Let e0,e1 be the ordered generator basis. A displayed matrixU=(u00u10u01u11)meansU(e0)=e0u00+e1u10,U(e1)=e0u01+e1u11.

Thus, for a right row w=(a,b),(a,b)U=(au00+bu10,au01+bu11).

On the dangerous Ef-piece, with s=Пғ2, the relevant rows are (s+3,вҲ’2),(s2+1,sвҲ’1).UseU0=( sвҲ’1sвҲ’212).Then (s+3,вҲ’2)U0=(s2+1,sвҲ’1),and det(U0)=2(sвҲ’1)вҲ’(sвҲ’2)=s,which is a unit. This is the fixed first Magnus layer used throughout the filtered Nielsen construction.The remaining idempotent pieces are either swaps or unit-controlled Nielsen moves, so the first-order obstruction vanishes globally.

Certificate B вҖ” primitive-boundary verifier

Use the reduced-coproduct verifier to computeLn=Primn(F2вҹЁA,Bвҹ©).

The recorded executable verifier outputsdimL1,вҖҰ,dimL10=2,3,2,6,6,11,18,36,56,105.ForвҲӮd:LdвҠ•LdвҶ’Ld+1,(u,v)вҶҰ[A,u]+[B,v],the same verifier prints the boundary and secondary quotient ranks. In particular, for 4вүӨdвүӨ10, it records the ranks needed for the coefficient-secondary quotientHd(2):=Ld[2]/imОёd0,withОёd0:kerвҲӮdвҶ’Ld[2],(u,v)вҶҰu[2]+v[2].The attached history records that this executable linear verifier reproduces the primitive dimensions, boundary ranks, and secondary quotient ranks used in the proof.

Certificate C вҖ” residual restricted-Lie induction

On the residual Ef,mod2,s=1 piece, the equation isS(Y0,Y1,q)=X2,whereS(Y0,Y1,q)=(Y1,Y1q)вҲ’1Y1вҲ’2Y03Y0q.If the first residual error appears in homogeneous degree n, it is primitive and lies in Ln. The correction boundary isвҲӮnвҲ’1:LnвҲ’1вҠ•LnвҲ’1вҶ’Ln,(U,V)вҶҰ[A,U]+[B,V].

The key recursion isLn/imвҲӮnвҲ’1вү…{0,Ln/2[2],nВ odd,nВ even.

The sweep proves the uniform inductionCm=Lm (mвүҘ5),so every odd layer is an ordinary boundary and every even square quotient is hit by a root transgression WвҶҰW[2]. Hence the residual Ef,mod2,s=1 obstruction tower vanishes to all orders.This is the uniform structural statement that replaces further case-hammering.

Certificate D вҖ” nonlinear finite base blocks The nonlinear finite block is now closed by four certificates.D.1 вҖ” residual degree-10 Bockstein witnesses The certificate gives explicit independent Bockstein shadows proving kerвҲӮ8вҶ L5[2].The attached history records six displayed kernel vectors whose degree-10 Bockstein shadows spanL10/imвҲӮ9вү…L5[2].D.2 вҖ” residual degree-16 lower-base toggle The exceptional residual degree-16 high torsor missed one line, detected by a functional О». The lower-base deformationY0вҶҰY0Y4 (X,(X,Y4))(Y,(Y,(X,Y4)))toggles that missing О»-value and moves the degree-16 class into the high-torsor image. This is the uniform lesson from degree 16: the fixed high gauge gives a false obstruction, while the full lower-plus-high torsor kills it.D.3 вҖ” A2=R/(4,t), d=4, Ој4 -toggle The final executable gap was the d=4 coefficient-Bockstein scalar. Turn 54 verifies:rankD5,6,7=60,and rank(D5,6,7Ој4B4)=61.

Since H4(2)is one-dimensional, this rank jump says exactly that the continuation kernel toggles the fixed Ој4=1 scalar to Ој4=0. The attached history records the verifier output, including the residual rank, the fixed Ој4, and the stacked rank 61.D.4 вҖ” d=8 coefficient quotient witness

The witness is(0,B8)вҲҲker([A,вҲ’]+[B,вҲ’]),soОё80(0,B8)=(B8)[2].

The residual high image at d=8 is the hyperplane kerО», andО»((B8)[2])=1.Therefore the residual codimension-one miss disappears after quotienting by imОё80.Together, D.1вҖ“D.4 prove the finite nonlinear base range.

Certificate E вҖ” normalized coefficient KoszulвҖ“Witt induction

On the dangerous Ef-coefficient piece,

R=EfОӣвү…Z2 [[t]],t=sвҲ’1.

The raw local row is(s2+1,sвҲ’1)=(2+2t+t2,t).But(s2+1)вҲ’(s+1)(sвҲ’1)=2,so the elementary Nielsen shearN=(1вҲ’(s+1)01)under the basis-action convention gives(s2+1,sвҲ’1)N=(2,t).

Thus the apparent 2t+t2 term is a coordinate artifact. After this exact normalization, the associated graded coefficient row is the regular Koszul row (Оұ,ОІ)ingr(2,t)

Rвү…F2 [Оұ,ОІ],Оұ=in(2),ОІ=in(t).The first t-layer is contractible. The first 2-Bockstein secondary maps satisfyBdвҶ Hd(2)(dвүҘ4).For higher (2,t)-adic layers, actual pro-2 representatives produce a Witt cascade, not a single naive Frobenius term. Ordered by Magnus root degree first, the cascade is triangular: Koszul syzygies slide ОІ-powers to pure Оұ-powers, pure Оұ-multiples are killed by the first 2-Bockstein maps, and coefficient-free square terms fall back into the closed residual tower.Hence every finite Ef-local coefficient obstruction is killable. The D.3 stack-rank 60вҶ’61 is the last finite executable certificate needed for this coefficient induction.

Certificate F вҖ” finite filtered Nielsen compactnessLet

M=ОӣвҹЁвҹЁX0,X1вҹ©вҹ©,I=(X0,X1).

For a degree cutoff N and an open two-sided ideal JвҠӮОӣ, definePN,J:=PвҲ©(1+IN+JM).

Then P/PN,J is a finite 2-group andN,JвӢӮPN,J=1.

Define SN,J to be the finite set of filtered Nielsen/cocycle data(y0,y1,cПғ,cП„)вҲҲ(P/PN,J)4 such that:y0,y1 have first Magnus layer UmodJ;cПғ,cП„ satisfy the finite cocycle relation encoding П„Пғ=П„2;the induced twisted substitution sendsПҒS=rSвҲ’1 to rH modulo PN,J.The residual induction, coefficient KoszulвҖ“Witt induction, and D.1вҖ“D.4 certificates proveSN,JоҖ =вҲ… for every finite coefficient-and-degree truncation. Each finite datum gives an actual finite over-G automorphism, because the first layer is invertible and the finite Frattini criterion applies to P/PN,J. This avoids both the false degree-only finite quotient and any Hopficity shortcut for the infinite pro-2 kernel.

The sets SN,J are finite and functorial under refinement, so compactness givesN,JlimSN,JоҖ =вҲ….A compatible inverse-limit point yields a continuous filtered Nielsen automorphism Оұ:PвҶ’P and a continuous cocycle c:GвҶ’P.

Together they define an over-G automorphism ОҰ:F=PвӢҠGвҶ’F,ОҰ(pg)=Оұ(p)c(g)g.

At every finite level,ОҰ(ПҒS)вүЎrH (modPN,J).

Intersecting over all (N,J) givesОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH inside F. Therefore ОҰ(вҹЁвҹЁrSвҹ©вҹ©F)=вҹЁвҹЁrHвҹ©вҹ©F.

Passing to quotients givesО“Sвү…О“H.

Because ОҰ is over G, the descended isomorphism satisfiesПҖHвҲҳОҰ=ПҖS.ThusО“Sвү…GО“H.

Turn 66 conclusion The proof should now be frozen in this appendix-contract form. No new Magnus layer, no new A2 -subcase, and no new coefficient ghost needs to be opened. The structural pattern is uniform: the residual tower collapses by Cm=Lm; the coefficient tower collapses after exact normalization to (2,t) and the KoszulвҖ“Witt cascade; and the finite filtered Nielsen compactness step globalizes the finite solutions to a continuous over-G automorphism.The only caveat is external reproducibility: the attached history records the verifier outputs, especially the D.3 stack-rank 60вҶ’61, but a standalone manuscript should attach the verifier scripts or explicit matrices/pivots.

ESTABLISHED: The certificate theorem proves a continuous over-G automorphism ОҰ:FвҶ’F with ОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH. Hence ОҰ identifies the closed normal relator subgroups and descends to О“Sвү…GО“H.

GAP: No structural mathematical gap remains inside the attached sweep. The only remaining gap is external reproducibility/presentation: a standalone paper should attach verifier code or explicit matrices/pivots for Certificates BвҖ“D, especially D.3вҖҷs stack-rank 60вҶ’61.

NEXT: Stop the obstruction search and draft the final manuscript from this certificate contract: theorem statement, basis-action convention, Certificates 0вҖ“F, verifier-output appendix, and the compactness descent.[TURN66-FINAL-CERTIFICATE-APPENDIX-ISO]
